meaning: 黄海(中国三大边缘海之一,北起鸭绿江口,南以长江口北岸到朝鲜济州岛一线同东海分界,西以渤海海峡与渤海相连)
examples: My left foot stands on HuangHai sea, and right foot on BoHai sea.
Suspended matter of water samples of large quantity taken from the Huanghai sea and East China sea were studied.
Forecasts of 29 stations in the Bohai Sea and 10 stations in the northern Huanghai Sea were made using the autoregression model every 10ds.
